key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which section of the top panel to place the indicator in.

key.name: panel-index
key.description: Order within the panel section (0 is leftmost).

key.name: album-art-grayscale
key.description: Display album artwork in black and white.

key.name: hide-when-no-players
key.description: Remove the panel indicator when no media players are available.

key.name: panel-label-scroll
key.description: Scroll long track titles in the panel instead of truncating them.

key.name: player-filter-mode
key.description: Which media players may be picked: every player ('all') or only whitelisted players ('whitelist').

key.name: player-filter-whitelist
key.description: App identifiers (desktop entries) allowed to be picked when the filter mode is 'whitelist'.
